title: Crumb Shaders
description: A very lightweight shader pack for Minecraft, designed to run on low-end hardware.
body:
# CrumbShaders
CrumbShaders is a shader pack built by and for low-end hardware users who still want a nice view with shaders, and have shadows in their worlds. It keeps core shader aesthetics while removing expensive effects like AO, reflections, volumetric lighting and raymarched shadows, while still maintaining atmosphere.

## Features
- Shadows
- Vignette
- Chromatic Aberration
- Bloom
- Dynamic Sky
- Atmospheric Fog
- Animated Water

## Support Me

- [https://www.youtube.com/@MonkePixels](https://www.youtube.com/@MonkePixels)
